# @oqlet/react-fill — LLM Reference

Schema-driven React form library. Pass a JSON array of field descriptors → get a fully
functional, accessible, themed form. Built on react-hook-form. Zero boilerplate.

## Install

```bash
npm install @oqlet/react-fill
# peer deps (install if not already present)
npm install react react-dom react-hook-form
```

Tested with React 17–19 and react-hook-form ^7.45.

---

## Quick Start

```tsx
import { DynamicForm } from "@oqlet/react-fill";
import type { FormFieldSchema } from "@oqlet/react-fill";

const schema: FormFieldSchema[] = [
  { name: "email",   label: "Email",    type: "email",    required: true },
  { name: "message", label: "Message",  type: "textarea", rows: 4 },
];

export default function MyForm() {
  return (
    <DynamicForm
      schema={schema}
      onSubmit={(data) => console.log(data)}
    />
  );
}
```

---

## DynamicForm Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Notes |
|------|------|---------|-------|
| `schema` | `FormFieldSchema[]` | **required** | Array of field descriptors |
| `onSubmit` | `(values: TValues) => void \| Promise<void>` | **required** | Called with typed form data on valid submit |
| `defaultValues` | `Partial<TValues>` | `{}` | Pre-fill field values on mount |
| `mode` | `"onChange" \| "onBlur" \| "onSubmit" \| "onTouched" \| "all"` | `"onSubmit"` | RHF validation trigger mode |
| `columns` | `number` | `1` | CSS grid column count for the form layout |
| `gap` | `string` | `"1rem"` | CSS gap between fields |
| `maxWidth` | `number \| string` | `undefined` | Max width of the form container |
| `theme` | `FormTheme` | `undefined` | Global class/style overrides (see Theme section) |
| `fieldRegistry` | `FieldRegistry` | all 18 types | Custom renderer map for tree-shaking |
| `formRef` | `React.Ref<DynamicFormHandle>` | `undefined` | Expose the RHF instance externally |
| `formLabel` | `string` | `undefined` | `aria-label` on the form element |
| `submitLabel` | `string` | `"Submit"` | Text on the submit button |
| `hideSubmitButton` | `boolean` | `false` | Hide the built-in submit button |
| `showReset` | `boolean` | `false` | Render a reset button |
| `resetLabel` | `string` | `"Reset"` | Text on the reset button |
| `onReset` | `() => void` | `undefined` | Called when the form is reset |
| `showErrorSummary` | `boolean` | `false` | Show an error summary banner on failed submit |
| `errorSummaryTitle` | `string` | `"Please fix the following errors:"` | Banner heading |
| `errorSummaryClass` | `string` | `undefined` | CSS class on the banner container |
| `renderSubmitButton` | `(props: SubmitButtonRenderProps) => ReactNode` | `undefined` | Replace built-in submit button entirely |
| `renderResetButton` | `(props: ResetButtonRenderProps) => ReactNode` | `undefined` | Replace built-in reset button entirely |
| `submitButtonIcon` | `ReactNode` | `undefined` | Icon left of the submit button label |
| `resetButtonIcon` | `ReactNode` | `undefined` | Icon left of the reset button label |
| `extraActions` | `{ label, onClick, type?, style?, className?, icon? }[]` | `[]` | Additional buttons rendered near submit |
| `formStyle` | `CSSProperties` | `undefined` | Inline style on the `<form>` element |
| `formClassName` | `string` | `undefined` | CSS class on the `<form>` element |
| `children` | `ReactNode` | `undefined` | Rendered inside the form after all fields |

### TypeScript generic

```tsx
type SignupValues = { email: string; plan: "free" | "pro" };

<DynamicForm<SignupValues>
  schema={schema}
  onSubmit={(data) => {
    // data is typed as SignupValues
    console.log(data.plan); // "free" | "pro"
  }}
/>
```

### Programmatic control via formRef

```tsx
import { useRef } from "react";
import { DynamicForm, type DynamicFormHandle } from "@oqlet/react-fill";

const ref = useRef<DynamicFormHandle>(null);

// Access the full RHF instance:
ref.current?.form.setValue("email", "new@example.com");
ref.current?.form.trigger("email");
ref.current?.form.reset();
const vals = ref.current?.form.getValues();
```

---

## FormFieldSchema — Complete Property Reference

Every field in the `schema` array is a `FormFieldSchema` object. Only `name`, `label`,
and `type` are required. All other props are optional.

### Identity

```ts
name: string          // unique key; becomes the key in submitted data
label: string         // displayed above the field
type: FieldType       // determines renderer — see Field Types section
```

### Value & State

```ts
defaultValue?: unknown          // pre-fill on mount
required?: boolean              // triggers required validation
requiredWhen?: ConditionConfig  // dynamic required (see Conditional Logic)
disabled?: boolean              // disables the field
disabledWhen?: ConditionConfig  // dynamic disabled (see Conditional Logic)
readOnly?: boolean              // value visible, not editable
placeholder?: string
```

### Validation

```ts
showErrorOnBlur?: boolean    // defer error display until blur
errorText?: string           // static override for all error messages
getErrorMessage?: (error: any) => string  // derive error message dynamically

validation?: {
  pattern?:   { value: RegExp; message: string };
  minLength?: { value: number; message: string };
  maxLength?: { value: number; message: string };
  // Cross-field or async validation. Return true = valid, string = error message.
  validate?: (value: any, formValues?: Record<string, any>) => boolean | string | Promise<boolean | string>;
  custom?:   (value: any, formValues?: Record<string, any>) => boolean | string | Promise<boolean | string>; // alias of validate
}
```

Example — cross-field validation:
```ts
{
  name: "confirmPassword", label: "Confirm Password", type: "text",
  validation: {
    validate: (value, formValues) =>
      value === formValues?.["password"] || "Passwords do not match",
  }
}
```

### Conditional Visibility

```ts
visibleWhen?: ConditionConfig    // show this field only when conditions pass
preserveValue?: boolean          // keep stored value when hidden (default: false — value is cleared)
```

### Layout

```ts
colSpan?: number     // grid columns to span (requires columns > 1 on DynamicForm)
fullWidth?: boolean  // span all columns regardless of count
```

### Input Formatting

```ts
inputFormatter?: (value: string) => string  // transform on every keystroke; return value is stored
allowedPattern?: RegExp                     // block keystrokes that don't match
inputMode?: "text" | "numeric" | "decimal" | "tel" | "email" | "url" | "search"
```

Phone mask example:
```ts
inputFormatter: (v) => {
  const d = v.replace(/\D/g, "");
  if (d.length <= 3) return d;
  if (d.length <= 6) return `${d.slice(0,3)}-${d.slice(3)}`;
  return `${d.slice(0,3)}-${d.slice(3,6)}-${d.slice(6,10)}`;
}
```

### Appearance & UX

```ts
tooltip?: string           // shown as ? icon with title attribute
icon?: ReactNode           // node inside the label
helpText?: string          // supplementary text near the field
helpTextAlignment?: "underLabel" | "underButton"  // position for radio/checkbox options
showWordCount?: boolean    // textarea only
rows?: number              // textarea row count
inline?: boolean           // radio options in a horizontal row
```

### Number / Date / Slider

```ts
min?: number | string
max?: number | string
step?: number
showSliderValue?: boolean  // default: true
```

### File

```ts
accept?: string    // e.g. "image/*,.pdf"
multiple?: boolean
```

### Rating

```ts
starCount?: number  // default: 5
```

### Field Array

```ts
addButtonLabel?: string     // default: "+ Add"
removeButtonLabel?: string  // default: "Remove"
```

### Options (select / radio / checkbox)

```ts
options?: {
  label: string;
  value: string;
  helpText?: string;
  disabled?: boolean;
  icon?: ReactNode;
  tooltip?: string;
  helpTextAlignment?: "underLabel" | "underButton";
}[]

// Async / dependent options:
getOptions?: (parentValue: any) => { label: string; value: string }[] | Promise<...>
apiEndpoint?: string   // fetches JSON from URL; querystring built from dependsOn values
dependsOn?: string | string[]  // field name(s) to watch; value passed to getOptions/apiEndpoint
```

### Event Handlers

```ts
onChange?: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => void
onBlur?:   (e: React.FocusEvent<HTMLInputElement>)  => void
onKeyDown?: (e: React.KeyboardEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => void
onValueChange?: (value: any, { setValue, getValues, trigger }) => void
onValueChangeDebounced?: (value: any, { setValue, getValues, trigger }) => void | Promise<void>
debounceMs?: number  // default: 500
```

### Per-field Styling

```ts
wrapperClass?: string;  wrapperStyle?: CSSProperties
labelClass?: string;    labelStyle?: CSSProperties
inputClass?: string;    inputStyle?: CSSProperties
errorClass?: string;    errorStyle?: CSSProperties
helpTextClass?: string; helpTextStyle?: CSSProperties
checkboxGroupClass?: string; checkBoxGroupStyle?: CSSProperties
radioGroupClass?: string;    radioGroupStyle?: CSSProperties
optionWrapperClass?: string; optionWrapperStyle?: CSSProperties
```

### Group / MultiField

```ts
// type: "group" — fieldset with nested fields
children?: FormFieldSchema[]
layoutClass?: string
layoutStyle?: CSSProperties

// type: "multiField" — inline horizontal row of sub-fields
multipleField?: FormFieldSchema[]  // ← "multipleField", not "subFields"
layoutClass?: string
layoutStyle?: CSSProperties
flex?: number | string  // per-sub-field flex sizing, e.g. flex: 3 or flex: "0 0 120px"
```

### Custom Rendering

```ts
// Full custom UI — still participates in RHF state and visibleWhen
render?: ({ name, error, register, defaultValue }) => ReactNode

// Reusable replacement component
overrideComponent?: React.FC<{ field: FormFieldSchema; name: string; error?: any; register: any }>
overrideComponentProps?: Record<string, any>
```

---

## All 18 Field Types

Use the string literal or import `FIELD_TYPES` from `"@oqlet/react-fill"`:

```ts
import { FIELD_TYPES } from "@oqlet/react-fill";
// FIELD_TYPES.TEXT, FIELD_TYPES.EMAIL, FIELD_TYPES.SELECT, etc.
```

| Type | String | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| Text | `"text"` | Single-line text input |
| Email | `"email"` | type="email" input |
| Number | `"number"` | Numeric input; supports `min`, `max`, `step` |
| Textarea | `"textarea"` | Multi-line; supports `rows`, `showWordCount` |
| Select | `"select"` | Single-value dropdown; supports `options`, `getOptions`, `apiEndpoint` |
| Multiselect | `"multiselect"` | Multi-value select; same option props as select |
| Radio | `"radio"` | Radio button group; supports `options`, `inline` |
| Checkbox | `"checkbox"` | Single checkbox or grouped checkboxes via `options` |
| Date | `"date"` | Date picker (`type="date"`); supports `min`, `max` |
| Time | `"time"` | Time picker (`type="time"`) |
| Datetime | `"datetime"` | Date + time picker (`type="datetime-local"`) |
| File | `"file"` | File upload; supports `accept`, `multiple` |
| Slider | `"slider"` | Range input; supports `min`, `max`, `step`, `showSliderValue` |
| Rating | `"rating"` | Star rating; supports `starCount` (default: 5) |
| FieldArray | `"fieldArray"` | Dynamic repeating rows of nested fields via `children` |
| Group | `"group"` | Fieldset grouping via `children` |
| MultiField | `"multiField"` | Inline horizontal row of sub-fields via `multipleField` |
| Additional Email | `"additionalEmail"` | Semantic alias for a second email input |

### Field type examples

```ts
// Select with static options
{ name: "role", label: "Role", type: "select",
  options: [{ label: "Admin", value: "admin" }, { label: "User", value: "user" }] }

// Select with async options dependent on another field
{ name: "city", label: "City", type: "select",
  dependsOn: "country",
  getOptions: async (country) => fetchCities(country) }

// Multiselect
{ name: "tags", label: "Tags", type: "multiselect",
  options: [{ label: "React", value: "react" }, { label: "TypeScript", value: "ts" }] }

// Radio inline
{ name: "plan", label: "Plan", type: "radio", inline: true,
  options: [{ label: "Free", value: "free" }, { label: "Pro", value: "pro" }] }

// Checkbox group (multiple values)
{ name: "interests", label: "Interests", type: "checkbox",
  options: [{ label: "Design", value: "design" }, { label: "Code", value: "code" }] }

// Single checkbox (boolean)
{ name: "agree", label: "I agree to the terms", type: "checkbox", required: true }

// Slider
{ name: "volume", label: "Volume", type: "slider", min: 0, max: 100, step: 5, defaultValue: 50 }

// Rating
{ name: "score", label: "Rating", type: "rating", starCount: 5 }

// File upload
{ name: "avatar", label: "Avatar", type: "file", accept: "image/*" }

// Textarea with word count
{ name: "bio", label: "Bio", type: "textarea", rows: 4, showWordCount: true, maxLength: 500 }

// Multi-field row (first name, MI, last name)
{
  name: "nameRow", label: "Full Name", type: "multiField",
  multipleField: [
    { name: "firstName", label: "First Name", type: "text", flex: 3 },
    { name: "mi",        label: "M.I.",        type: "text", flex: 0.5 },
    { name: "lastName",  label: "Last Name",   type: "text", flex: 3 },
  ]
}

// Group (fieldset)
{
  name: "address", label: "Address", type: "group",
  children: [
    { name: "street", label: "Street", type: "text", fullWidth: true },
    { name: "city",   label: "City",   type: "text" },
    { name: "zip",    label: "ZIP",    type: "text" },
  ]
}

// Dynamic repeating rows
{
  name: "contacts", label: "Contacts", type: "fieldArray",
  addButtonLabel: "+ Add Contact",
  children: [
    { name: "name",  label: "Name",  type: "text" },
    { name: "email", label: "Email", type: "email" },
  ]
}
```

---

## Conditional Logic

`ConditionConfig` is the shared type for `visibleWhen`, `requiredWhen`, and `disabledWhen`.
The effect differs but the shape is identical.

```ts
interface ConditionConfig {
  logic?: "AND" | "OR";  // default: "AND" — all conditions must pass
  conditions: {
    field: string;        // dot-path to the controlling field, e.g. "address.country"
    value?: any | any[];  // expected value; use array for "in"/"notIn"
    operator?: "equals" | "notEquals" | "in" | "notIn" | "exists" | "notExists";
    // default operator: "equals"
  }[];
}
```

### visibleWhen — show/hide

```ts
// Show "companyName" only when role === "business"
{ name: "companyName", label: "Company", type: "text",
  visibleWhen: {
    conditions: [{ field: "role", operator: "equals", value: "business" }]
  }
}

// Show when plan is "pro" OR "enterprise"
{ name: "ssoConfig", label: "SSO Config", type: "text",
  visibleWhen: {
    conditions: [{ field: "plan", operator: "in", value: ["pro", "enterprise"] }]
  }
}

// Multiple conditions with OR logic
{ name: "taxId", label: "Tax ID", type: "text",
  visibleWhen: {
    logic: "OR",
    conditions: [
      { field: "country", operator: "equals", value: "US" },
      { field: "country", operator: "equals", value: "CA" },
    ]
  }
}

// Keep value when hidden
{ name: "memo", label: "Memo", type: "text",
  visibleWhen: { conditions: [{ field: "showMemo", value: true }] },
  preserveValue: true
}
```

### requiredWhen — dynamic required

```ts
// Require "vatNumber" only when country === "DE"
{ name: "vatNumber", label: "VAT Number", type: "text",
  requiredWhen: {
    conditions: [{ field: "country", operator: "equals", value: "DE" }]
  }
}
```

### disabledWhen — dynamic disabled

```ts
// Disable "discount" for free plan users
{ name: "discount", label: "Discount", type: "number",
  disabledWhen: {
    conditions: [{ field: "plan", operator: "equals", value: "free" }]
  }
}
```

### Operators reference

| Operator | Passes when |
|----------|-------------|
| `"equals"` (default) | `fieldValue === value` |
| `"notEquals"` | `fieldValue !== value` |
| `"in"` | `value.includes(fieldValue)` |
| `"notIn"` | `!value.includes(fieldValue)` |
| `"exists"` | `fieldValue` is truthy |
| `"notExists"` | `fieldValue` is falsy |

---

## Async / Dependent Options

```ts
// Static options — always the same
{ name: "country", label: "Country", type: "select",
  options: [{ label: "USA", value: "us" }, { label: "Canada", value: "ca" }] }

// Async — function that returns a promise
{ name: "city", label: "City", type: "select",
  dependsOn: "country",
  getOptions: async (countryValue) => {
    const res = await fetch(`/api/cities?country=${countryValue}`);
    return res.json();  // must be { label: string; value: string }[]
  }
}

// Async — URL endpoint (library calls fetch internally)
{ name: "city", label: "City", type: "select",
  dependsOn: "country",
  apiEndpoint: "/api/cities"
  // GET /api/cities?country=<value>
}

// Multiple dependencies (all values passed as object to getOptions)
{ name: "suburb", label: "Suburb", type: "select",
  dependsOn: ["country", "state"],
  getOptions: async ({ country, state }) => fetchSuburbs(country, state)
}
```

---

## Theme System

Pass a `FormTheme` object once — every field picks it up. Per-field props always win.

Precedence: **library defaults → theme styles/classes → per-field styles/classes**

```ts
import type { FormTheme } from "@oqlet/react-fill";

const theme: FormTheme = {
  // Strip all built-in inline styles — your CSS framework owns the appearance
  unstyled: true,

  // Class name slots (24 slots total)
  wrapperClass: "mb-4",
  labelClass: "block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1",
  inputClass: "w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500",
  inputErrorClass: "border-red-500 focus:ring-red-400",
  errorClass: "mt-1 text-xs text-red-600",
  helpTextClass: "mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500",
  requiredMarkClass: "text-red-500 ml-0.5",
  radioGroupClass: "flex flex-col gap-2",
  radioInputClass: "h-4 w-4 accent-blue-600",
  checkboxGroupClass: "flex flex-col gap-2",
  checkboxInputClass: "h-4 w-4 accent-blue-600",
  optionWrapperClass: "flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-700",
  groupLayoutClass: "grid grid-cols-2 gap-4",
  submitButtonClass: "px-5 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-md hover:bg-blue-700 font-semibold",
  resetButtonClass: "px-5 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-50",
  extraButtonClass: "px-4 py-2 border rounded text-sm",
  // FormWizard-specific
  wizardClass: "max-w-xl mx-auto p-8 bg-white rounded-2xl shadow",
  stepperClass: "mb-8",
  navigationClass: "mt-8 flex gap-4",

  // Theme-level inline styles (per-field *Style props override these)
  inputStyle: { borderRadius: "8px", height: "42px" },
  labelStyle: { fontWeight: 600 },
  wrapperStyle: { marginBottom: "1.25rem" },
  errorStyle: { color: "#dc2626" },
  helpTextStyle: { color: "#6b7280" },

  // Swap built-in renderers per field type
  components: {
    date: MyCustomDatePicker,   // React.FC<FieldComponentProps>
    select: MyReactSelectField,
  },
};

<DynamicForm schema={schema} theme={theme} onSubmit={fn} />
```

### Bootstrap example

```ts
const bootstrapTheme: FormTheme = {
  unstyled: true,
  wrapperClass: "mb-3",
  labelClass: "form-label",
  inputClass: "form-control",
  inputErrorClass: "is-invalid",
  errorClass: "invalid-feedback d-block",
  helpTextClass: "form-text",
  radioGroupClass: "d-flex flex-column gap-1",
  optionWrapperClass: "form-check",
  checkboxGroupClass: "form-check",
  requiredMarkClass: "text-danger",
  submitButtonClass: "btn btn-primary",
  resetButtonClass: "btn btn-secondary",
};
```

---

## FormWizard

Multi-step form wrapper. Each step validates independently before advancing.

```tsx
import { FormWizard } from "@oqlet/react-fill";
import type { FormFieldSchema } from "@oqlet/react-fill";

// IMPORTANT: steps use `title` (not `label`) for the step heading
const steps = [
  {
    title: "Personal Info",           // ← "title", not "label"
    description: "Tell us about you", // optional
    fields: [                          // ← "fields", not "schema"
      { name: "firstName", label: "First Name", type: "text", required: true },
      { name: "lastName",  label: "Last Name",  type: "text", required: true },
    ] as FormFieldSchema[],
  },
  {
    title: "Contact",
    fields: [
      { name: "email", label: "Email", type: "email", required: true },
      { name: "phone", label: "Phone", type: "text" },
    ] as FormFieldSchema[],
  },
  {
    title: "Preferences",
    fields: [
      { name: "newsletter", label: "Subscribe to newsletter", type: "checkbox" },
      { name: "theme", label: "Preferred Theme", type: "radio",
        options: [{ label: "Light", value: "light" }, { label: "Dark", value: "dark" }] },
    ] as FormFieldSchema[],
  },
];

<FormWizard
  steps={steps}
  onSubmit={(data) => console.log(data)}  // called after final step submits
  theme={myTheme}                          // same FormTheme as DynamicForm
  showProgress                             // optional progress bar
  onStepChange={(step) => console.log(step)}
/>
```

### FormWizard props

| Prop | Type | Notes |
|------|------|-------|
| `steps` | `WizardStep[]` | **required** |
| `onSubmit` | `(values: any) => void` | **required** — called on final step submit |
| `theme` | `FormTheme` | Same as DynamicForm; `wizardClass`, `stepperClass`, `navigationClass` slots |
| `fieldRegistry` | `FieldRegistry` | Custom renderer map |
| `showProgress` | `boolean` | Show a progress bar above the stepper |
| `onStepChange` | `(step: number) => void` | Called whenever the step changes |
| `wizardStyle` | `CSSProperties` | Inline style on the outer wrapper |
| `navigationStyle` | `CSSProperties` | Inline style on the prev/next button row |
| `progressStyle` | `CSSProperties` | Inline style on the progress bar |
| `renderProgress` | `(current, total) => ReactNode` | Custom progress renderer |
| `renderNavigation` | `(helpers) => ReactNode` | Custom prev/next button renderer |
| `formLabel` | `string` | `aria-label` on the form |

### WizardStep shape

```ts
interface WizardStep {
  title?: string;
  description?: string;
  fields: FormFieldSchema[];
  validationMode?: "onChange" | "onBlur" | "onSubmit" | "onTouched";
}
```

---

## Field Registry — Tree-shaking

By default, all 18 field types are included. Pass a subset to ship only what you use:

```tsx
import { DynamicForm } from "@oqlet/react-fill";
import TextField from "@oqlet/react-fill/FieldTypes/TextField";
import SelectField from "@oqlet/react-fill/FieldTypes/SelectField";
import EmailField from "@oqlet/react-fill/FieldTypes/TextField"; // email uses same renderer

const registry = { text: TextField, select: SelectField, email: EmailField };

<DynamicForm schema={schema} fieldRegistry={registry} onSubmit={fn} />
```

The same `fieldRegistry` prop is available on `<FormWizard>`.

---

## Grid Layout

```tsx
// 2-column layout with a full-width field
<DynamicForm
  schema={[
    { name: "firstName", label: "First Name", type: "text" },
    { name: "lastName",  label: "Last Name",  type: "text" },
    { name: "bio",       label: "Bio",        type: "textarea", fullWidth: true },
    { name: "city",      label: "City",       type: "text", colSpan: 1 },
    { name: "country",   label: "Country",    type: "select", colSpan: 1,
      options: [{ label: "USA", value: "us" }] },
  ]}
  columns={2}
  onSubmit={fn}
/>
```

---

## Common Patterns

### Controlled default values

```tsx
<DynamicForm
  schema={schema}
  defaultValues={{ role: "user", newsletter: true }}
  onSubmit={fn}
/>
```

### onBlur-only validation

```tsx
<DynamicForm schema={schema} mode="onBlur" onSubmit={fn} />

// Or per-field:
{ name: "email", label: "Email", type: "email", showErrorOnBlur: true }
```

### Cascading selects (country → state → city)

```ts
[
  { name: "country", label: "Country", type: "select",
    options: [{ label: "USA", value: "us" }, { label: "Canada", value: "ca" }] },
  { name: "state", label: "State", type: "select",
    dependsOn: "country",
    getOptions: (country) => fetchStates(country) },
  { name: "city", label: "City", type: "select",
    dependsOn: "state",
    getOptions: (state) => fetchCities(state) },
]
```

### Derived field value (onValueChange)

```ts
{ name: "price", label: "Price", type: "number",
  onValueChange: (value, { setValue }) => {
    setValue("priceWithTax", (Number(value) * 1.1).toFixed(2));
  }
}
```

### Debounced async lookup

```ts
{ name: "username", label: "Username", type: "text",
  onValueChangeDebounced: async (value, { setValue, trigger }) => {
    const taken = await checkUsername(value);
    if (taken) setValue("usernameError", "Username taken");
  },
  debounceMs: 400
}
```

### Custom render prop

```ts
{ name: "avatar", label: "Avatar", type: "text",
  render: ({ name, register, error }) => (
    <MyImageUploader {...register(name)} hasError={!!error} />
  )
}
```

---

## Gotchas

1. **`multipleField` not `subFields`** — inline row sub-fields live under `multipleField`, not `subFields`.

2. **FormWizard uses `title` not `label`** — `WizardStep.title` is the step heading. Using `label` silently produces no heading.

3. **FormWizard uses `fields` not `schema`** — `WizardStep.fields: FormFieldSchema[]`. Using `schema` has no effect.

4. **`validate` second param is optional** — signature is `(value: any, formValues?: Record<string, any>)`. Always use optional chaining: `formValues?.["fieldName"]`.

5. **`unstyled: true` only suppresses library defaults** — theme-level `inputStyle`, `labelStyle`, etc. still apply. Set them to `undefined` explicitly if you want no styles at all.

6. **`visibleWhen` clears the value by default** — when a field is hidden, its RHF value resets to `""`. Set `preserveValue: true` to retain it.

7. **`dependsOn` with array passes an object to `getOptions`** — when `dependsOn: ["a", "b"]`, `getOptions` receives `{ a: value, b: value }`, not a single value.

8. **`defaultOperator` is `"equals"`** — you can omit `operator` when checking strict equality.

9. **`colSpan` requires `columns > 1`** on the parent `DynamicForm`. In a 1-column layout `colSpan` has no visible effect.

10. **`inputFormatter` must call `controllerField.onChange(formattedValue)` internally** — the library handles this. Do not construct a synthetic event; just return the transformed string.

11. **`FIELD_TYPES` constants match the string literals exactly** — `FIELD_TYPES.TEXT === "text"`, `FIELD_TYPES.MULTI_FIELD === "multiField"`, etc. Either form is valid in schemas.

12. **`type: "additionalEmail"` renders as `type="email"`** — it is a semantic alias, not a separate visual component. Use it to distinguish a secondary email field in form data.

---

## Exports

```ts
import {
  DynamicForm,          // main form component
  FormWizard,           // multi-step wrapper
  FIELD_TYPES,          // constants object for all 18 type strings
  FormThemeContext,     // React context (for custom field components)
  useFormTheme,         // hook — access current FormTheme inside a custom field
} from "@oqlet/react-fill";

import type {
  FormFieldSchema,      // field descriptor type
  FormTheme,            // theme object type
  ConditionConfig,      // type for visibleWhen / requiredWhen / disabledWhen
  DynamicFormHandle,    // ref type (exposes .form: UseFormReturn)
  FieldRegistry,        // map of fieldType → React component
} from "@oqlet/react-fill";
```
